title: 30o: BlobIntegrityMismatch distinct from Parse
description: Blob SHA-256 verification failure is a separate ClientError variant (BlobIntegrityMismatch { expected, actual }) rather than folding into Parse. The distinction matters for retry semantics: a Parse error means the server sent a malformed response and a retry will reproduce the same failure; an integrity mismatch means the bytes arrived correctly but were corrupted or the server is misbehaving, and the correct recovery is to re-fetch blob metadata (not just retry the same download). Keeping them separate lets callers route each case appropriately without string-matching on error messages.
close_reason: decision record: BlobIntegrityMismatch is correct distinct from Parse
